texto: This kiss was different from the first one under the olive tree. That one had been unplanned, she was pretty sure. This kiss had intention and hunger branded all over it. It was like one of those kisses you read about in fairy tales—but Alana had never imagined that such a kiss could cause bone-trembling shivers as well as bliss. She’d never considered the downside of the awakening kiss, of how the princess felt when the hero tore through the thorns or scaled the tower and speared heat and sex and life-changing energy into the princess’s world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pamela Aares: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “This kiss was different from the first one under the olive tree. That one had been unplanned, she…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, alpha-males, baseball pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de baseball e contemporary-romance.
